style_summary: A raw urban snapshot treated like a personal visual diary, combining real public-space photography with bold hand-drawn comic overlays, handwritten travel notes, saturated cartoon faces, and a large foreground gesture.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main person, group, object, or scene focus
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object, product, ticket, bag, food, device, or symbolic hand prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: dense public urban location such as metro, bus, market, hallway, escalator, diner, or station platform
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: realistic crowd, signage, rails, doors, lights, posters, floor markings, reflections, and compressed phone-photo details
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: large handwritten diary title or location note
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small handwritten date, route, mood note, or short repeated annotation
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: simple doodled underline, star, circle, arrow, spark, stamp, or route marker
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: casual streetwear, backpacks, hoodies, caps, work jackets, sneakers, practical city clothes

prompt_template: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in urban-transit-doodle-diary-style featuring {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, set in {LOCATION}. Include {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}, main text "{MAIN_TEXT}", secondary text "{SECONDARY_TEXT}", {ACCENT_SYMBOL}, and {WARDROBE_STYLE}.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, clean vector poster, fully animated scene, polished ad layout, luxury fashion shoot, empty background, sterile studio, perfect typography, corporate brochure, glossy mascot illustration

values.SUBJECT: main subject
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object, product, prop, or visual anchor
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: secondary scene details and visual texture
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: separator, sticker, symbol, or decorative mark
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: styling, clothing, character, or visual treatment
